speaker: Arnold Schwarzenegger
caption:
Don't let others tell you who to be. Figure out for yourself what makes you happy. — Arnold Schwarzenegger. The blueprint to building your own life.

#arnold #success #vision #selfmade #asalilife #motivation

speaker: Jim Carrey
caption:
"You can fail at what you don't want, so you might as well take a chance on doing what you love." — Jim Carrey. Choose love over fear.

#jimcarrey #fearvslove #purpose #asalilife #followyourheart #motivation

speaker: Al Pacino
caption:
"The inches we need are everywhere around us." — Al Pacino, Any Given Sunday. Fight for every single inch in front of you.

#alpacino #anygivensunday #inches #fighter #asalilife #nevergiveup

speaker: Rocky Balboa
caption:
"It ain't about how hard you hit. It's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward." — Rocky Balboa. That's how winning is done.

#rocky #nevergiveup #resilience #keepgoing #asalilife #strength

speaker: Les Brown
caption:
"You gotta be HUNGRY!" — Les Brown. Greatness doesn't come to those who wait. It comes to those who are starving for it.

#lesbrown #hungry #greatness #motivation #asalilife #dreambig

speaker: Matthew McConaughey
caption:
"My hero is me in 10 years." — Matthew McConaughey. Always be chasing a better version of yourself. You'll never catch it, and that's the point.

#matthewmcconaughey #hero #selfimprovement #oscar #asalilife #growth

speaker: Muhammad Ali
caption:
"I hated every minute of training, but I said, Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion." — Muhammad Ali

#muhammadali #champion #training #discipline #asalilife #neverquit

speaker: Nelson Mandela
caption:
"It always seems impossible until it's done." — Nelson Mandela. Every great achievement was once considered impossible.

#nelsonmandela #impossible #persistence #asalilife #motivation

speaker: Bruce Lee
caption:
"Do not pray for an easy life, pray for the strength to endure a difficult one." — Bruce Lee

#brucelee #strength #endurance #martialarts #asalilife #mindset

speaker: Walt Disney
caption:
"All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them." — Walt Disney

#waltdisney #dreams #courage #imagination #asalilife #dreambig

speaker: Albert Einstein
caption:
"In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity." — Albert Einstein

#einstein #opportunity #difficulty #genius #asalilife #mindset

speaker: Martin Luther King Jr.
caption:
"If you can't fly then run, if you can't run then walk, if you can't walk then crawl, but whatever you do you have to keep moving forward." — Martin Luther King Jr.

#mlk #keepgoing #forward #civilrights #asalilife #motivation

speaker: Will Smith
caption:
"The only thing that I see that is distinctly different about me is I'm not afraid to die on a treadmill. You might be more talented, but I will outwork you." — Will Smith

#willsmith #outwork #grind #hustle #asalilife #workethic

speaker: Dwayne Johnson
caption:
"Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency. Consistent hard work gains success. Greatness will come." — Dwayne Johnson

#therock #consistency #hardwork #success #asalilife #grind

speaker: Conor McGregor
caption:
"We're not just here to take part. We're here to take over." — Conor McGregor

#conormcgregor #takeover #ufc #champion #asalilife #fearless

speaker: Jay-Z
caption:
"Everybody look at you strange, say you changed. Like you worked that hard to stay the same." — Jay-Z

#jayz #growth #evolution #hiphop #asalilife #change

speaker: Bob Marley
caption:
"You never know how strong you are until being strong is your only choice." — Bob Marley

speaker: Winston Churchill
caption:

speaker: Theodore Roosevelt
caption:

speaker: Mark Twain
caption:

speaker: Steve Harvey
caption:

speaker: Tony Robbins
caption:

speaker: Gary Vaynerchuk

speaker: Barack Obama
caption:
